parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 4096, system: $json.systemPrompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Client feedback (' + $json.intent + '):\n\n' + $json.transcript }] }) }}

nodes.name: Trigger WF2 (Internal)
nodes.notes: MANUAL STEP: After import, replace this with an n8n 'Execute Workflow' node pointing to WF2, passing entry_id and project_id. Or use an HTTP Request to POST to your own /webhook/trigger-execution endpoint.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, text: '🎯 ' + $('Parse Action Items').item.json.count + ' action item(s) generated Project: ' + $('Build Claude Prompt').item.json.githubRepo + ' From: ' + $('Build Claude Prompt').item.json.intent + ' feedback Execution triggered.', parse_mode: 'HTML' }) }}
